001package net.okocraft.box.api.model.item;
002
003import net.kyori.adventure.text.Component;
004import org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006
007/**
008 * An interface of the item that can deposit or withdraw.
009 */
010public interface BoxItem {
011
012    /**
013     * Gets the original {@link ItemStack}.
014     *
015     * The item returned by this method must not be modified.
016     *
017     * If you want to change it, you should use {@link #getClonedItem()}.
018     *
019     * @return the original {@link ItemStack}
020     */
021    @NotNull ItemStack getOriginal();
022
023    /**
024     * Gets the cloned {@link ItemStack}.
025     *
026     * @return the cloned {@link ItemStack}
027     */
028    @NotNull ItemStack getClonedItem();
029
030    /**
031     * Gets the plain name of this item.
032     *
033     * @return the plain name of this item
034     */
035    @NotNull String getPlainName();
036
037    /**
038     * Gets the display name of this item as a {@link Component}.
039     *
040     * @return the display name of this item as a {@link Component}
041     */
042    @NotNull Component getDisplayName();
043
044    /**
045     * Gets the internal id of this item.
046     *
047     * @return the internal id of this id
048     */
049    int getInternalId();
050}
